cohort_definitions.blocked_or_pending: Tasks whose project-level P2P-broad construction is pending or blocked; excluded from main regression-aware metrics.
cohort_definitions.p2p_broad_main: Tasks with completed project-level P2P-broad manifests and main-metric inclusion enabled.
cohort_definitions.p2p_local_smoke: Tasks with task-file or local P2P evidence only; appendix or smoke evidence, not final main labels.
cohort_definitions.retained_oracle_only: Tasks with stable retained fail-to-pass oracle labels but no completed project-level P2P-broad scope.

tasks.notes: A migrated UTF-8 log oracle and six curated candidate patches validated under F2P plus project-level P2P-broad. The P2P scope retains 24 stable tests after excluding the F2P oracle and four buggy-baseline failures. Dependencies were installed only in an ignored isolated PySnooper venv from declared test extras.

Blocked after checkout and F2P probe. The run_test target is test_custom_repr_single, but buggy collection requires a missing tests/mini_toolbox.py fixture and the reference checkout imports pycompat.PY2 without defining it in pycompat.py. The user confirmed that compatibility/test-fixture shims are not allowed for main-cohort admission at this stage.

A migrated file-output oracle and four candidate patches validated under F2P plus project-level P2P-broad. The P2P scope retains four stable tests after excluding the F2P oracle. Dependencies were installed only in an ignored isolated PySnooper_3 venv from declared runtime and test requirements; no task-specific compatibility/test-fixture shim was introduced.

f2p_oracle.buggy: not_run: buggy checkout timed out before BugsInPy marker files were written

tasks.notes: Metadata-level target looked like pure version-comparison logic, but the large Ansible buggy checkout exceeded the bounded feasibility window and did not write bugsinpy_run_test.sh. The partial retained workspace was removed; no F2P or P2P scope was attempted.
Unittest adapter ran, but project-level discovery produced a failed import because black requires typed_ast; dependency installation was not done silently.

Screened as a possible sixth project-level P2P task. The checkout declares typed-ast>=1.4.0 and importing black fails with ModuleNotFoundError: typed_ast in the current Python 3.11 environment; prior typed-ast install attempts require local MSVC build tools. Do not silently install or emulate typed_ast.
Unittest adapter ran, but project-level discovery produced a failed import because black requires typed_ast; dependency installation was not done silently.

An isolated Cookiecutter dependency venv plus audited coverage-only addopts override produced a completed project-level P2P-broad scope with 290 stable tests. A migrated multiple-hook oracle and 11 candidate patches validated under F2P plus project-level P2P-broad. The P2P scope retains 278 stable tests after excluding the F2P oracle and seven buggy-baseline failures.

A migrated prompt choice oracle and four candidate patches validated under F2P plus project-level P2P-broad. The P2P scope retains 255 stable tests after excluding four parameterized F2P oracle nodeids and three buggy-baseline failures.

F2P oracle is clear, but full-repo discovery timed out twice. After user-approved official-test-root policy, the FastAPI tests/ scope also exceeded the 60 minute construction budget without a manifest. No task-file-level downgrade or test-fixture shim was used.

No dependency substitution, fixture edit, or task-file P2P downgrade was used.
